title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Om Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
